perks.name: Craftsmanship
perks.description: You've acquired the basics of craftsmanship and know how to properly use all kinds of tools.

perks.name: Advanced Blacksmithing
perks.description: You've gained quite some finesse, allowing you to craft plate armor and fine jewelry.

perks.name: Arcane Craftsmanship
perks.description: You've learned techniques to craft bolts and arrows that explode with elemental fury.

perks.name: Legendary Blacksmithing
perks.description: You can even improve the divine artifacts of Aedra and Daedra.

perks.name: Advanced Light Armors
perks.description: You've been read An Introduction to Scale Armors, allowing you to craft scale armor.

perks.name: Elven Smithing
perks.description: You've gained enough finesse to create and improve Elven armor and weapons.

perks.name: Dwarven Smithing
perks.description: You've acquired the secret knowledge of how to create Dwarven equipment.

perks.name: Orcish Smithing
perks.description: Orcish equipment is hard to craft, but you've got what it takes.

perks.name: Glass Smithing
perks.description: Crafting Glass equipment is not for the unskilled.

perks.name: Daedric Smithing
perks.description: The creation of daedric weapons and armor is a secret few mortals know.
